name: DoIP_SetRoutingActivationOEMSpecific
title: DoIP_SetRoutingActivationOEMSpecific
description: Sets the OEM-specific parameters in the Routing Activation Request Message.

parameters.name: sendOEMSpecific
parameters.description: 0: Do not send the OEM specific field (default)1: Send the given value in the OEM specific field

description: The message can also be configured from the DoIP.INI file
example.code:
// Send a constant in the RAR message
DoIP_SetRoutingActivationOEMSpecific( 1, 0x31425927);
